title: Spells, Swords, And Dungeons [Fabric]
description: Spells, Swords, And Dungeons  is a Modpack focused on completely overhauling magic, combat, and exploration!
body:
![Alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/AA_2/BH_AA_PROMO.webp)
https://bisecthosting.com/WatermelonFrogy

**Spells, Swords, And Dungeons is a special upgrade for Minecraft 1.20.1 that makes the game way more exciting.**

**Magic Makeover:**
Magic gets a big boost with this upgrade. You can learn different kinds of magic spells from a special table. You'll be able to throw fire, Freeze enemies, And even channel the arcane arts!

**Cooler Combat:**
Fighting monsters and bad guys becomes way cooler. You can use different moves like dodging, and you can use all sorts of weapons to defeat enemies. It's not just about hitting anymore; you have to think and plan your moves.

**Awesome Adventures:**
Exploring the world gets even more exciting. There are new places to discover, like magical forests and secret dungeons. These places are full of surprises, like hidden treasures!

**Lots of Mods Together:**
This upgrade is like a mix of many mini-upgrades. It adds a bunch of new features that all work together to make the game better. There are new ways to do magic, new things to fight with, and new places to visit.

**Play the Way You Want:**
You can play with your friends and share your adventures. Plus, you can change how the game works and add new mods or remove mods to fit what you like. It's like getting to choose the rules of your own adventure!

In short, Spells, Swords, And Dungeons (for Minecraft 1.20.1) is a super fun upgrade that makes magic cooler, fighting more exciting, and exploring way more awesome. It's like getting a whole bunch of new stuff to do and play with in Minecraft!

**Whats the difference between the fabric and forge versions?**
The fabric and forge versions are essentially completely different modpacks with completely different quests but the same story-line.
The fabric version is for those of you who want a more calming, vanilla+, and cinematic experience well the forge is for those who want a more advanced, technical, and difficult experience.
*I personally prefer the forge version!*
The Forge Version Can Be Found Here!
https://modrinth.com/modpack/spells-swords-and-dungeons-forge

**Modpack Plans**
My main goal of this modpack is to add Cutscenes, A proper Storyline, And a nice Quest layout that fits the storyline!

**CURRENTLY THE MODPACK IS KITCHENSINK AS IT IS IN A EARLY BETA PHASE!**
